svg.title: Evolution of tier architectures from 1-tier to n-tier
svg.desc: Four architecture diagrams showing how systems evolve from everything on one machine (1-tier) to separated client-server (2-tier) to presentation-logic-data (3-tier) to multiple specialized services (n-tier)
svg.text: Each split buys flexibility but costs latency and complexity.
More tiers ≠ better. Choose the simplest tier that meets your constraints.
